{{Youmay|the starship|[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|the battle]] fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]}}
The '''''Battle of Yavin''''' was an [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] which was captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was assigned to the [[Black Curs]], a band of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and outlaws led by [[Dirk Harkness]].

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the ''Battle of Yavin'' crashed on [[Hensara III]] while fleeing the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Havoc (Strike-class)|''Havoc'']]. After the ''Havoc'' withdrew, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] entered the [[Hensara system/Legends|Hensara system]] to rescue the ship's crew. The ''Havoc'' returned while the rescue operation was underway, but its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] forces were soundly beaten in what came to be known as the [[Rout of Hensara]].

{{Ship-stub}}
